title: cenchrus ciliaris var. pallens
intro: Cenchrus ciliaris var. pallens, also known as the blue grama grass, is a variant of the blue grama plant that is native to the Great Plains region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cenchrus ciliaris var. pallens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
